# Pin the AWS stack so pip's resolver doesn't backtrack through dozens of boto3
# versions on every CI run.
#
# The squeeze: aiobotocore (pulled transitively by s3fs / earthaccess) caps
# botocore<1.43.1, but the newest boto3 needs a newer botocore — so pip walks
# boto3 backwards looking for a match, downloading each version's metadata.
# Pin the newest mutually-compatible set:
#   boto3 1.43.0  -> requires botocore 1.43.0
#   botocore 1.43.0 -> inside aiobotocore 3.7.0's window (>=1.42.90,<1.43.1)
#                       and >= maap-py 4.2.0's floor (>=1.34.139)
#
# Bump these together when you intentionally upgrade aiobotocore/s3fs/maap-py.
boto3==1.43.0
botocore==1.43.0
aiobotocore==3.7.0
